options.name: -libs
options.description: List of library names to search through. If not specified, all libraries will be searched.

options.name: -rule
options.description: Name of the rule to find. If not specified, the init_oa_default_rule variable will be used and if the variable has an empty string value, the standard lookup (LEFDefaultRouteSpec by type, then by name) will be used.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Echo details of library name where the rule was found (including descending through technology references from libraries specified in the lib_list)
